data.title: Jamie Dimon Says He Turned Down A Shot At The Presidency As It Means 'Waving Goodbye To My Family,' But The JPMorgan Chief Won't Rule Out A Future Run
data.description: Jamie Dimon, the Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE: JPM), has recently shared insights into why he chose not to pursue a bid for the U.S. presidency. His decision was influenced by family considerations and an absence of political experience.

Jeff Bezos' $10 Billion Earth Fund Pulls Support From Key Climate Initiative: What Happened?
data.description: According to the Financial Times, the Earth Fund—a $10 billion initiative founded by Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) founder Jeff Bezos—has discontinued its support for the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi), a major verifier of corporate climate goals that influences how companies like Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) and H&M attain a "net zero" label.
